plugins.name: datadog
plugins.description: Datadog integration for Azure SRE Agent, providing structured access to Datadog's monitoring and analytics platform.

plugins.name: atlassian-rovo
plugins.description: Atlassian integration for Azure SRE Agent, enabling seamless interaction with Atlassian's suite of tools such as Jira, Confluence, Compass, and Jira Service Management.

plugins.name: pager-duty
plugins.description: PagerDuty integration for Azure SRE Agent, providing structured access to PagerDuty's incident management platform.

plugins.name: elasticsearch
plugins.description: Elasticsearch integration for Azure SRE Agent, providing structured access to Elasticsearch clusters for querying logs, analyzing metrics, and checking cluster health.

plugins.name: dynatrace
plugins.description: Dynatrace integration for Azure SRE Agent, providing structured access to Dynatrace's observability platform for logs, metrics, problems, and vulnerabilities.

plugins.name: aws
plugins.description: AWS integration for Azure SRE Agent, providing secure access to AWS services including documentation, API calls, and operational procedures via the AWS MCP Server.

plugins.name: azure-managed-grafana
plugins.description: Azure Managed Grafana integration for Azure SRE Agent, providing access to dashboards, Azure Monitor metrics, Application Insights, Azure Data Explorer, SQL Server, and Resource Graph queries via the built-in AMG-MCP endpoint.
